aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.description: Orchestrates Cognito custom auth challenge sequence
Generates magic link token, rate-limits, sends email via SES
Validates magic link token via HMAC, checks expiry, marks used
Enforces allowed email domain restriction on signup
Injects team membership group claims into JWT

aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.smsVerificationMessage: The verification code to your new account is {####}

aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.definition:
# Claude Stats — AppSync GraphQL Schema
# Derived from doc/analysis/team-app/05-api-design.md

# ── Enums ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

enum TeamRole { ADMIN MEMBER }
enum ShareLevel { FULL SUMMARY MINIMAL }
enum ChallengeStatus { ACTIVE COMPLETED }
enum InterTeamChallengeStatus { PENDING ACTIVE COMPLETED }
enum CrossTeamVisibility { PRIVATE PUBLIC_STATS PUBLIC_DASHBOARD }
enum AchievementCategory { PRODUCTIVITY EFFICIENCY TEAM MILESTONES FUN }

# ── User types ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

type User {
  userId: ID!
  email: String!
  displayName: String!
  avatarUrl: String
  accounts: [LinkedAccount!]!
  preferences: UserPreferences!
  personalityType: String
  streak: StreakInfo!
  achievements: [Achievement!]!
}

type UserPublicProfile {
  userId: ID!
  displayName: String!
  avatarUrl: String
  personalityType: String
  streak: StreakInfo
  recentAchievements: [Achievement!]
}

type LinkedAccount {
  accountId: ID!
  label: String!
  shareWithTeams: Boolean!
  sharePrompts: Boolean!
}

type UserPreferences {
  timezone: String!
  weekStartDay: Int!
  defaultShareLevel: ShareLevel!
  streakWeekendGrace: Boolean!
}

# ── Team types ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

type Team {
  teamId: ID!
  teamName: String!
  teamSlug: String!
  logoUrl: String
  inviteCode: String
  memberCount: Int!
  settings: TeamSettings!
  members: [TeamMember!]!
  currentChallenge: Challenge
}

type TeamMember {
  userId: ID!
  displayName: String!
  role: TeamRole!
  shareLevel: ShareLevel!
  joinedAt: AWSTimestamp!
  stats(period: String!): MemberStats
  streak: StreakInfo
  recentAchievements: [Achievement!]
}

type TeamSettings {
  leaderboardEnabled: Boolean!
  leaderboardCategories: [String!]!
  challengesEnabled: Boolean!
  minMembersForAggregates: Int!
  crossTeamVisibility: CrossTeamVisibility!
}

# ── Stats types ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

type MemberStats {
  sessions: Int!
  prompts: Int!
  inputTokens: Long
  outputTokens: Long
  estimatedCost: Float
  activeMinutes: Int
  modelsUsed: AWSJSON
  topTools: [String!]
  velocityTokensPerMin: Float
  subagentRatio: Float
  projectBreakdown: [ProjectStats!]
}

type ProjectStats {
  projectId: String!
  sessions: Int!
  prompts: Int!
  estimatedCost: Float
}

type ProjectInsights {
  projectId: String!
  period: String!
  totalSessions: Int!
  totalPrompts: Int!
  totalTokens: Long!
  estimatedCost: Float!
  contributors: [ProjectContributor!]!
  modelsUsed: AWSJSON
  trend: [ProjectTrendPoint!]!
}

type ProjectContributor {
  displayName: String!
  sessions: Int!
  prompts: Int!
}

type ProjectTrendPoint {
  date: String!
  sessions: Int!
  prompts: Int!
  estimatedCost: Float!
}

# ── Dashboard types ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

type TeamDashboard {
  team: Team!
  period: String!
  aggregate: TeamAggregate
  leaderboard: Leaderboard
  memberCards: [MemberCard!]!
  chemistry: TeamChemistry
  superlatives: [Superlative!]!
  projectSummary: [ProjectStats!]!
  computedAt: AWSTimestamp!
}

type TeamAggregate {
  totalSessions: Int!
  totalPrompts: Int!
  totalInputTokens: Long!
  totalOutputTokens: Long!
  totalEstimatedCost: Float!
  activeMemberCount: Int!
  avgSessionsPerMember: Float!
  avgCostPerMember: Float!
}

type Leaderboard {
  categories: [LeaderboardCategory!]!
}

type LeaderboardCategory {
  name: String!
  awardName: String!
  rankings: [LeaderboardEntry!]!
}

type LeaderboardEntry {
  rank: Int!
  displayName: String!
  value: Float!
  formattedValue: String!
}

type MemberCard {
  userId: ID!
  displayName: String!
  personalityType: String
  streak: StreakInfo
  stats: MemberStats
  recentAchievements: [Achievement!]
}

type TeamChemistry {
  score: Int!
  breakdown: ChemistryBreakdown!
}

type ChemistryBreakdown {
  diversityBonus: Int!
  coverageBonus: Int!
  syncBonus: Int!
  streakBonus: Int!
  challengeBonus: Int!
  balancePenalty: Int!
}

type Superlative {
  label: String!
  displayName: String!
  value: String!
}

# ── Gamification types ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

type StreakInfo {
  currentStreak: Int!
  longestStreak: Int!
  weekendGraceEnabled: Boolean!
  freezeTokensRemaining: Int!
  lastActiveDate: String
}

type Achievement {
  achievementId: ID!
  name: String!
  description: String!
  category: AchievementCategory!
  icon: String!
  unlockedAt: AWSTimestamp!
  shared: Boolean!
  context: AWSJSON
}

type AchievementDefinition {
  achievementId: ID!
  name: String!
  description: String!
  category: AchievementCategory!
  icon: String!
  threshold: AWSJSON
  hidden: Boolean!
}

type AchievementEvent {
  userId: ID!
  displayName: String!
  achievement: Achievement!
  teamId: ID!
}

type Challenge {
  challengeId: ID!
  name: String!
  metric: String!
  startTime: AWSTimestamp!
  endTime: AWSTimestamp!
  status: ChallengeStatus!
  participants: [ChallengeParticipant!]!
}

type ChallengeParticipant {
  userId: ID!
  displayName: String!
  score: Float!
  rank: Int!
}

# ── Cross-team types ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

type TeamComparisonEntry {
  teamId: ID!
  teamName: String!
  teamSlug: String!
  logoUrl: String
  memberCount: Int!
  aggregate: TeamAggregate
}

type InterTeamChallenge {
  challengeId: ID!
  name: String!
  metric: String!
  startTime: AWSTimestamp!
  endTime: AWSTimestamp!
  status: InterTeamChallengeStatus!
  creatingTeamId: ID!
  inviteCode: String
  teams: [InterTeamChallengeTeam!]!
}

type InterTeamChallengeTeam {
  teamId: ID!
  teamName: String!
  teamSlug: String!
  logoUrl: String
  score: Float!
  rank: Int!
}

# ── Sync types ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

type SyncedSession {
  sessionId: ID!
  projectId: String
  firstTimestamp: AWSTimestamp!
  lastTimestamp: AWSTimestamp!
  claudeVersion: String!
  entrypoint: String!
  promptCount: Int!
  inputTokens: Long!
  outputTokens: Long!
  cacheCreationTokens: Long
  cacheReadTokens: Long
  models: [String!]!
  accountId: String!
  isSubagent: Boolean!
  parentSessionId: String
  estimatedCost: Float!
  updatedAt: AWSTimestamp!
}

type SyncedMessage {
  uuid: ID!
  sessionId: ID!
  timestamp: AWSTimestamp!
  model: String!
  stopReason: String
  inputTokens: Long!
  outputTokens: Long!
  tools: [String!]
  thinkingBlocks: Int
  promptText: String
}

type SyncResult {
  itemsWritten: Int!
  itemsSkipped: Int!
  conflicts: [ConflictItem!]!
}

type ConflictItem {
  key: String!
  serverVersion: Int!
  serverItem: AWSJSON
}

type LogoUploadUrl {
  uploadUrl: String!
  logoUrl: String!
}

type TeamStatsUpdate {
  teamId: ID!
  period: String!
  computedAt: AWSTimestamp!
}

# ── Queries ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

type Query {
  # User
  me: User! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  userProfile(userId: ID!): UserPublicProfile @aws_cognito_user_pools

  # Teams
  myTeams: [Team!]! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  team(teamId: ID!): Team! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  teamDashboard(teamId: ID!, period: String!): TeamDashboard! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  teamMembers(teamId: ID!): [TeamMember!]! @aws_cognito_user_pools

  # Stats (own data)
  mySessions(from: AWSTimestamp, to: AWSTimestamp, limit: Int): [SyncedSession!]! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  myStats(period: String!): MemberStats! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  myProjects(period: String!): [ProjectStats!]! @aws_cognito_user_pools

  # Project insights
  teamProjectInsights(teamId: ID!, projectId: String!, period: String!): ProjectInsights! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  teamProjects(teamId: ID!, period: String!): [ProjectStats!]! @aws_cognito_user_pools

  # Session detail
  sessionMessages(sessionId: ID!): [SyncedMessage!]! @aws_cognito_user_pools

  # Achievements
  myAchievements: [Achievement!]! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  availableAchievements: [AchievementDefinition!]! @aws_cognito_user_pools

  # Challenges
  activeChallenge(teamId: ID!): Challenge @aws_cognito_user_pools
  challengeHistory(teamId: ID!, limit: Int): [Challenge!]! @aws_cognito_user_pools

  # Cross-team
  teamsComparison(period: String!): [TeamComparisonEntry!]! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  teamBySlug(slug: String!): Team @aws_cognito_user_pools
  teamDashboardAsReader(teamId: ID!, period: String!): TeamDashboard @aws_cognito_user_pools

  # Inter-team challenges
  activeInterTeamChallenges: [InterTeamChallenge!]! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  interTeamChallengeHistory(limit: Int): [InterTeamChallenge!]! @aws_cognito_user_pools

  # Admin
  allowedDomains: [String!]! @aws_cognito_user_pools
  allTeams: [Team!]! @aws_cognito_user_pools
}

# ── Mutations ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

type Mutation {
  # User
  updateProfile(input: UpdateProfileInput!): User!
  linkAccount(input: LinkAccountInput!): LinkedAccount!
  unlinkAccount(accountId: ID!): Boolean!
  updateAccountSharing(accountId: ID!, shareWithTeams: Boolean, sharePrompts: Boolean): LinkedAccount!

  # Teams
  createTeam(input: CreateTeamInput!): Team!
  updateTeamSettings(teamId: ID!, input: TeamSettingsInput!): Team!
  deleteTeam(teamId: ID!): Boolean!
  regenerateInviteCode(teamId: ID!): String!

  # Membership
  joinTeam(inviteCode: String!): Team!
  leaveTeam(teamId: ID!): Boolean!
  updateMembership(teamId: ID!, input: MembershipInput!): TeamMember!
  removeMember(teamId: ID!, userId: ID!): Boolean!
  promoteMember(teamId: ID!, userId: ID!): TeamMember!

  # Sync
  syncSessions(input: [SyncSessionInput!]!): SyncResult!
  syncMessages(input: [SyncMessageInput!]!): SyncResult!

  # Stats (internal)
  refreshTeamStats(teamId: ID!, period: String!): TeamStatsUpdate! @aws_iam

  # Achievements
  unlockAchievement(achievementId: ID!, context: AWSJSON): Achievement!
  toggleAchievementVisibility(achievementId: ID!, shared: Boolean!): Achievement!

  # Challenges
  createChallenge(teamId: ID!, input: ChallengeInput!): Challenge!
  joinChallenge(challengeId: ID!): Boolean!
  completeChallenge(challengeId: ID!): Challenge!

  # Team logos
  requestTeamLogoUpload(teamId: ID!): LogoUploadUrl!
  deleteTeamLogo(teamId: ID!): Boolean!

  # Dashboard sharing
  grantDashboardAccess(teamId: ID!, readerTeamId: ID!): Boolean!
  revokeDashboardAccess(teamId: ID!, readerTeamId: ID!): Boolean!

  # Inter-team challenges
  createInterTeamChallenge(teamId: ID!, input: InterTeamChallengeInput!): InterTeamChallenge!
  joinInterTeamChallenge(teamId: ID!, inviteCode: String!): InterTeamChallenge!
  completeInterTeamChallenge(challengeId: ID!): InterTeamChallenge!

  # Account management
  deleteMyAccount: Boolean!

  # Admin
  updateAllowedDomains(domains: [String!]!): [String!]!
}

# ── Subscriptions ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

type Subscription {
  onTeamStatsUpdated(teamId: ID!): TeamStatsUpdate
    @aws_subscribe(mutations: ["refreshTeamStats"])

  onAchievementUnlocked(teamId: ID!): Achievement
    @aws_subscribe(mutations: ["unlockAchievement"])

  onChallengeUpdated(teamId: ID!): Challenge
    @aws_subscribe(mutations: ["createChallenge", "completeChallenge"])

  onInterTeamChallengeUpdated(challengeId: ID!): InterTeamChallenge
    @aws_subscribe(mutations: ["completeInterTeamChallenge"])

  onSessionSynced(userId: ID!): SyncResult
    @aws_subscribe(mutations: ["syncSessions"])
}

# ── Input types ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

input SyncSessionInput {
  sessionId: ID!
  projectId: String
  projectPathHash: String
  firstTimestamp: AWSTimestamp!
  lastTimestamp: AWSTimestamp!
  claudeVersion: String!
  entrypoint: String!
  promptCount: Int!
  assistantMessageCount: Int!
  inputTokens: Long!
  outputTokens: Long!
  cacheCreationTokens: Long
  cacheReadTokens: Long
  toolUseCounts: AWSJSON
  models: [String!]!
  accountId: String!
  isSubagent: Boolean!
  parentSessionId: String
  thinkingBlocks: Int
  estimatedCost: Float!
  _version: Int!
}

input SyncMessageInput {
  sessionId: ID!
  uuid: ID!
  timestamp: AWSTimestamp!
  model: String!
  stopReason: String!
  inputTokens: Long!
  outputTokens: Long!
  cacheCreationTokens: Long
  cacheReadTokens: Long
  tools: [String!]
  thinkingBlocks: Int
  serviceTier: String
  promptText: String
  _version: Int!
}

input UpdateProfileInput {
  displayName: String
  avatarUrl: String
  timezone: String
  weekStartDay: Int
  defaultShareLevel: ShareLevel
  streakWeekendGrace: Boolean
  personalityType: String
}

input LinkAccountInput {
  accountId: String!
  label: String!
  shareWithTeams: Boolean!
  sharePrompts: Boolean
}

input CreateTeamInput {
  teamName: String!
  logoUrl: String
}

input TeamSettingsInput {
  leaderboardEnabled: Boolean
  leaderboardCategories: [String!]
  challengesEnabled: Boolean
  minMembersForAggregates: Int
  crossTeamVisibility: CrossTeamVisibility
}

input InterTeamChallengeInput {
  name: String!
  metric: String!
  startTime: AWSTimestamp!
  endTime: AWSTimestamp!
}

input MembershipInput {
  displayName: String
  shareLevel: ShareLevel
  sharedAccounts: [String!]
}

input ChallengeInput {
  name: String!
  metric: String!
  startTime: AWSTimestamp!
  endTime: AWSTimestamp!
}
